evals.prompt: /omv-radar refresh --dry-run for a watchlist containing npm demo-package
evals.expected_output: Runs fixture-backed dry run, reports passive sources, and does not append events.

evals.prompt: /omv-radar brief after advisory, release, and suspected-fix events exist
evals.expected_output: Groups signals by ecosystem, package, and signal type.
Stops and asks the user to create the watchlist.
Keeps passive boundary and does not run PoCs or probe runtime services.
Offers an opt-in weekly Monday refresh reminder without creating it automatically.
